personal.preferred_title: Data Engineer | Big Data Pipelines | Spark & Cloud

summary: Data Engineer with 20+ years of enterprise engineering experience building scalable data pipelines, optimizing data models, and delivering analytics-ready datasets. Strong hands-on expertise in Python, SQL, Spark-oriented processing, workflow automation, and cloud data architectures. Proven ability to improve data quality, automate manual processes, and collaborate across cross-functional teams in dynamic Agile environments.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Built and maintained large-scale Python/SQL data pipelines ingesting and transforming telemetry from 6,000+ endpoints.
Implemented automated data validation, quality checks, and monitoring workflows to improve timeliness and trust in downstream data products.
Optimized data delivery pipelines and processing performance for analytics and operational decision support.
Collaborated with engineering, analytics, and business stakeholders to resolve data issues and improve platform outcomes.

experience.title: Performance Engineer
bullets: Integrated multi-source telemetry and monitoring data to support actionable analytics and efficiency improvements.
Supported cloud modernization initiatives and contributed to data-driven process optimization.

experience.title: Senior Consultant (APM SME)
bullets: Developed extraction and transformation scripts used for enterprise reporting and operational troubleshooting.
Worked with cross-functional teams to standardize data workflows and improve reliability of technical insights.

experience.title: Senior Systems & Data Migration Engineer
bullets: Led high-volume data migration/transformation initiatives with focus on performance, integrity, and maintainability.
Built validation and dependency-aware workflows to improve migration reliability.

experience.title: Performance Test Engineer
bullets: Performed root-cause analysis on internal application/process issues and delivered data-backed recommendations.

education.degree: High Diploma / Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

projects.name: Scalable Hybrid-Cloud Data Pipeline Program
projects.description: Built and optimized data pipelines and quality controls to improve completeness, timeliness, and reliability of enterprise data flows.

projects.name: Data Operations Automation Initiative
projects.description: Automated manual data handling and validation tasks, improving consistency and reducing operational bottlenecks.
